name: Grain Boundary Length Measurement in Metallographic Sample
description: You are a materials scientist characterizing an Au-Pb-Sn solder alloy. Using the 'AuPbSn 40' sample in Fiji, select a representative slice and measure the total length of the inter-phase boundaries. Calculate the boundary density as the total boundary length divided by the total image area. Save a CSV file to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/grain_boundary_analysis.csv' containing the image dimensions (width, height), total image area in pixels^2, total boundary length in pixels, and boundary density in pixels^-1. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
